title: uranthera recurva
intro: Uranthera recurva is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Spurge family, and is native to tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Uranthera recurva include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to support skin and wound care.
